trait.erfahrung.ravager.description: +0.5 ATK per kill, max 5 stacks, 5s decay.
trait.erfahrung.deathwish.description: Damage scales with missing health (up to +5 ATK).

trait.erfahrung.last_stand.description: -50%% damage for 10s when HP drops below 20%%; 60s cooldown.
trait.erfahrung.swiftstrike.description: +2 ATK on first hit per target (5s window).
trait.erfahrung.challenger.description: +0.5 reach while holding a melee weapon.
trait.erfahrung.spearhead.description: +1 ATK and +10%% movement speed while sprinting.
